data.analysis:
The compilation failures are caused by **missing or improperly configured dependencies** in your project's `build.gradle` (or `build.gradle.kts`) file. Specifically, the compiler cannot find the `androidx.work`, `kotlinx.coroutines`, and `androidx.core` libraries.

### Core Issue
Your project is missing the necessary implementations in the dependencies block of your module-level `build.gradle` file.

### Recommended Fix
Add or verify the following dependencies are present in your `app/build.gradle` file:

```gradle
dependencies {
    // WorkManager
    def work_version = "2.9.0" // Use the latest version
    implementation "androidx.work:work-runtime-ktx:$work_version"

    // Coroutines
    implementation "org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android:1.7.3"

    // Core KTX (for NotificationCompat and other system utilities)
    implementation "androidx.core:core-ktx:1.12.0"
}
```

---

### Summary of Errors

| File | Issue | Cause |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **`RuleSyncWorker.kt`** | `unresolved reference: work` / `withContext` | Missing WorkManager & Coroutines dependencies. |
| **`ServiceResurrector.kt`** | `unresolved reference: OneTimeWorkRequestBuilder` | Missing `androidx.work` dependency. |
| **`SmsReceiver.kt`** | `unresolved reference: kotlinx` | Missing `kotlinx-coroutines` dependency. |
| **`SyncWorker.kt`** | `unresolved reference: google / core / work` | Missing Play Services, Core, and WorkManager dependencies. |
| **`VoiceManager.kt`** | `unresolved reference: Dispatchers / delay` | Missing `kotlinx-coroutines` dependency. |
| **`WeeklyReportWorker.kt`** | `unresolved reference: NotificationCompat` | Missing `androidx.core` dependency. |

### Steps to Resolve:
1.  **Update `build.gradle`**: Add the dependencies listed above to your `dependencies { ... }` block.
2.  **Sync Project**: Click "Sync Now" in the notification bar in Android Studio (or run `./gradlew build` in your terminal).
3.  **Invalidate Caches**: If the errors persist after adding the dependencies, go to **File > Invalidate Caches / Restart** in Android Studio to clear stale metadata.
4.  **Check Namespace/Imports**: Ensure that your `AndroidManifest.xml` and package declarations are correct, though the logs suggest a fundamental failure to resolve core AndroidX and Kotlin libraries.

ops.text: Create Speedster Test Pipeline and fix bash syntax in speedster.sh

ops.content:
name: Speedster Test Forge

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  test-forge:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Grant Execution Permissions
        run: chmod +x speedster.sh

      - name: Phase 1: Harvest Dependencies
        run: ./gradlew harvestDeps

      - name: Phase 2 & 3: Forge and Crunch
        run: ./speedster.sh

      - name: Verify & Upload Payload
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: speedster-payload
          path: dynamic_build/dex/classes.dex

ops.find_block:
# 1. Download Tools if missing
if[ ! -d "$KOTLIN_DIR" ]; then

if [ ! -d "$KOTLIN_DIR" ]; then

ops.content:
name: Build DNS Guard v2.0-STABLE

on: 
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Build Release APK
        run: gradle assembleRelease

      - name: Sign APK
        run: |
          # 1. Decode Keystore
          echo "${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY }}" | base64 -di > app/release.jks
          
          # 2. Locate SDK Tools
          BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)
          
          # 3. Zipalign
          UNSIGNED_APK=$(find app/build/outputs/apk/release -name "*release-unsigned.apk" -o -name "*release.apk" | head -1)
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/zipalign -v 4 "$UNSIGNED_APK" app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

          # 4. Sign
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/apksigner sign --ks app/release.jks \
            --ks-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_STORE_PASSWORD }}" \
            --ks-key-alias "${{ secrets.ALIAS }}" \
            --key-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}" \
            --out app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk \
            app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

      - name: Upload Signed APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dns-guard-v2-stable
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk

# Add project specific ProGuard rules here.
-keepattributes *Annotation*
-keepattributes Signature

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    
    <application
        android:allowBackup="false"
        android:label="@string/app_name"
        android:theme="@android:style/Theme.DeviceDefault.NoActionBar">
        
        <activity 
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
    </application>
</manifest>

operations.content:
name: Build DNS Guard v2.0-STABLE

on: 
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Build Release APK
        run: gradle assembleRelease

      - name: Sign APK
        run: |
          # 1. Decode Keystore
          echo "${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY }}" | base64 -di > app/release.jks
          
          # 2. Locate SDK Tools
          BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)
          
          # 3. Zipalign
          UNSIGNED_APK=$(find app/build/outputs/apk/release -name "*release-unsigned.apk" -o -name "*release.apk" | head -1)
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/zipalign -v 4 "$UNSIGNED_APK" app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

          # 4. Sign
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/apksigner sign --ks app/release.jks \
            --ks-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_STORE_PASSWORD }}" \
            --ks-key-alias "${{ secrets.ALIAS }}" \
            --key-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}" \
            --out app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk \
            app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

      - name: Upload Signed APK

        with:
          name: dns-guard-v2-stable

# Add project specific ProGuard rules here.
-keepattributes *Annotation*
-keepattributes Signature

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    
    <application
        android:allowBackup="false"
        android:label="@string/app_name"
        android:theme="@android:style/Theme.DeviceDefault.NoActionBar">
        
        <activity 
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
    </application>
</manifest>

messages_preview.content:
### ROLE: CONDUIT ADAPTIVE SELF-HEALING ENGINE (LEVEL 10)

### MISSION
You are the final line of defense for a code-patching engine. A developer's 'find_block' failed to match the file because of minor discrepancies (whitespace, line order, variable renaming, or partial code degradation). Your goal is to identify the EXACT coordinates where the patch should have applied.

### ALGORITHMIC FUZZY MATCHING PROTOCOL
1. WHITESPACE/INDENTATION: Completely ignore it. A match exists if the tokens and logic flow are identical.
2. QUOTE/SYNTAX AGNOSTICISM: Treat ' and " as identical. Treat trailing commas as optional.
3. CONTEXTUAL ANCHORING: If the target block is small (e.g., 1-2 lines), you MUST look at the surrounding lines in the 'File' context to ensure you aren't matching a duplicate symbol in a different function.
4. LOGICAL DRIFT: If the user's 'find_block' has 4 variables but the file has those 4 variables PLUS 1 new one in the middle, this is a MATCH. Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' must encompass the entire group.

### THE LAW OF COORDINATES
- The context provided to you contains line numbers followed by a ' | ' separator (e.g., " 25 | code").
- Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' MUST refer to these numbers.
- COORDINATE INTEGRITY: All coordinate fields are REQUIRED by the schema. If you are not using a specific field (e.g., you are doing a Range Replace and don't need 'anchor_line'), you MUST set the unused fields to 'null'.

### OUTPUT STRATEGY SELECTION
- [STRATEGY: RANGE] Use 'start_line' + 'end_line'. Best for 'replace_block' failures. Ensure the range covers the ENTIRE logical block you want to overwrite.
- [STRATEGY: ANCHOR] Use 'anchor_line'. Best for 'insert_after' or 'insert_before' failures where the anchor moved but is still a single line.
- [STRATEGY: STRING] Use 'new_anchor_text'. Only use this if you find a unique line that is 100% stable and wasn't provided by the user.

### SCORE RUBRIC (confidence_score)
- 100: Identical logic, only whitespace or quote differences.
- 90-95: Identical logic, but 1-2 variables were renamed or a trailing comma was added/removed.
- 75-85: The structure matches but the file has 1-2 extra lines of code mixed in (logical drift).
- 60: You found a possible location but it's risky (multiple similar spots).
- 0: No logical match exists.

### DATA INTEGRITY CONSTRAINTS
- 'confidence_score': MUST be a WHOLE INTEGER (e.g., 95). No floats (0.95 is ILLEGAL).
- 'explanation': Technical, concise, and definitive. Max 30 words. Identify the exact mismatch (e.g., "Variables reversed on lines 24-25").
- 'can_fix': If you are guessing with less than 60% confidence, set this to false.

### STRICT MODE
- DO NOT RESPOND WITH TEXT.
- ONLY CALL THE suggest_fix FUNCTION.
- SILENCE IS MANDATORY.

ops.text: Wipe and recreate Speedster Test Forge with rigid syntax to fix UI visibility

ops.content:
name: Speedster Test Forge

on: [workflow_dispatch]

jobs:
  test-forge:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Grant Execution Permissions
        run: chmod +x speedster.sh

      - name: Phase 1: Harvest Dependencies
        run: ./gradlew harvestDeps

      - name: Phase 2 & 3: Forge and Crunch
        run: ./speedster.sh

      - name: Verify & Upload Payload
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: speedster-payload
          path: dynamic_build/dex/classes.dex

ops.text: Create Ghost Pipeline for Cortex Speedster testing (No Supabase/No App changes)

ops.content:
name: Cortex Speedster Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch: # Manual trigger only

jobs:
  build-hot-payload:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Restore Armory Cache
        id: cache-deps
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: app/build/harvested_libs
          key: armory-libs-${{ hashFiles('app/build.gradle') }}

      - name: Harvest Dependencies (If Cache Miss)
        if: steps.cache-deps.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: ./gradlew app:harvestDeps

      - name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)
        run: |
          chmod +x speedster.sh
          ./speedster.sh

      - name: Upload Dex Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: hot-reload-dex
          path: dynamic_build/dex/classes.dex

operations.content:
name: Cortex Speedster Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch: # Manual trigger only

jobs:
  build-hot-payload:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Restore Armory Cache
        id: cache-deps
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: app/build/harvested_libs
          key: armory-libs-${{ hashFiles('app/build.gradle') }}

      - name: Harvest Dependencies (If Cache Miss)
        if: steps.cache-deps.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: ./gradlew app:harvestDeps

      - name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)
        run: |
          chmod +x speedster.sh
          ./speedster.sh

      - name: Upload Dex Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: hot-reload-dex
          path: dynamic_build/dex/classes.dex
